items.title: UNH Deploys AI in Optum Rx to Tackle Pharmacy Fraud and Cost Leakage
items.description: UnitedHealth rolls out AI in Optum Rx to flag pharmacy fraud, billing anomalies and medication risks, aiming to curb cost leakage and improve compliance.

items.title: Healthcare Jobs Drop, UnitedHealth Stock Slips: Opportunity or Risk?
items.description: UNH faces rising medical costs, regulatory probes and a healthcare hiring slump while shares keep falling, leaving investors weighing risk or opportunity.
